completed_tasks.name: Phase 4 discuss — gather context via adaptive questioning
STATE.md updated to record phase 4 context session

remaining_tasks.name: Plan phase 4 — create PLAN.md(s) for six lab profiles

decisions.decision: JWT: 4 separate microservice containers (RS256, HS256-weak, RSA1024, alg:none), each with JWKS + /token endpoint
decisions.rationale: Scanner needs distinct per-algorithm JWKS discovery; one-per-container keeps them fully isolated

decisions.decision: Registry: 3 custom Dockerfiles with old crypto libs (old-libssl, old-pycrypto, mixed)
decisions.rationale: Controlled, documented expected findings vs pulling old base images

decisions.decision: Source: Gitea with init script seeding 4 anti-pattern categories (hardcoded keys, weak algo, weak random, deprecated protocols)
decisions.rationale: API-based seeding on startup — no pre-baked volume needed

decisions.decision: Storage: new profile with LocalStack KMS-only + Vault dev mode + postgres/pgcrypto
decisions.rationale: Independent of existing cloud profile; Vault sidecar writes transit keys on startup

decisions.decision: ssh-weak: custom Dockerfile with explicit weak KEX/hostkey/MAC in sshd_config
decisions.rationale: Env-var overrides cannot reliably replace sshd_config in linuxserver image

decisions.decision: LDAPS: new ldaps profile with independent osixia/openldap on port 636 (LDAP_TLS=true)
decisions.rationale: Existing identity profile openldap (plain LDAP port 13890) untouched

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase to create the phase 4 PLAN.md(s) — context is complete in 04-CONTEXT.md, all six lab profile decisions are locked
context_notes: Phase 3 (scanner-coverage) fully verified. Phase 4 discussion complete — all six Docker Compose profiles (jwt, registry, source, storage, ssh-weak, ldaps) have design decisions locked in 04-CONTEXT.md. No code written yet for phase 4. The canonical refs in CONTEXT.md point to the existing compose file and phase 3 scanner files that new lab profiles must validate. JWT language/framework is Claude's discretion at plan/exec time.
